source: gauntlet/runs/v04/ and gauntlet/runs/v04a/ directory contents (verified on disk, not asserted complete)
note: Counts are raw files present per run directory. They reflect what exists on disk, not run success or transcript quality. Some v04 runs are partial or empty — shown honestly.

counterbalance.note: Tests whether v4's 'Cowen won at P15' is a recency artifact: Cowen always spoke last in v4 (P11 Ed / P12 Jensen / P13 Cowen). v4a permutes ONLY the three Part-C voice slots — voice content byte-identical, no new prompts/voices/biographies. EJC = the v4 baseline order (control); CJE and JEC are the two permutations run here. run_v4a.py adds --order.
